heading: Lump-sum allowances for House Majority Whip and Minority Whip
label: 5146 Lump-sum allowances for House Majority Whip and Minority Whip
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 74a–10b of this titleSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2010, which is div. A of .Pub. L. 111–68

children.text: The allowance for the office of the Majority Whip is increased by $96,000.
The allowance for the office of the Minority Whip is increased by $96,000.
